name: ruledoctor
description: Coverage for your AI coding rules — measure whether .cursorrules / CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md were actually read and followed by the model. 规则体检。

scripts.demo: npm run build && node dist/index.js --cwd examples/demo-project --session examples/demo-project/session.jsonl
scripts.demo:html: npm run build && node dist/index.js --cwd examples/demo-project --session examples/demo-project/session.jsonl --format html --out docs/demo-report.html
scripts.setup:here: npm run build && node dist/index.js setup -p .
scripts.sync:skill: mkdir -p skills/ruledoctor/scripts plugin/scripts && cp scripts/*.mjs skills/ruledoctor/scripts/ && cp scripts/*.mjs plugin/scripts/
